g.text: git merge origin/main or git rebase origin/main

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git status - Show the current state of files and branches.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git branch -a - Show all local and remote-tracking branches.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git log --oneline --graph --decorate --all - Show commit history and branch structure.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: echo "# test" >> README.md - Create a README file and add "# test"

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git init - Initialize a Git repository in this directory

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git add README.md - Stage the file for commit

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git commit -m "first commit" - Save the first commit

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git branch -M main - Rename the current branch to main

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git remote add origin <repo-url> - Connect the local repository to GitHub

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git push -u origin main - Push to GitHub and set the upstream branch

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git push <remote> <branch> - Upload the current local branch and commits to GitHub, and update the corresponding remote branch.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git fetch <remote> <branch> - Download the latest updates from remote repository to local Git repository, but do not change current branch.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git merge <branch-or-commit> - Merge another branch or commit into the current local branch.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git pull <remote> <branch> - Download the latest updates from the remote repository and merge them into the current local branch.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git rebase <base-branch> - Replay the current branch's commits on top of another branch, rewriting history to create a cleaner commit history.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git rebase --continue - Continue rebase after resolving conflicts.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git rebase --abort - Cancel the current rebase.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git restore <file> - Discard unstaged changes in a file.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git restore --staged <file> - Remove the file from the staging area

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git reset --soft HEAD~1 - Undo the last commit, but keep changes staged.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git reset --mixed HEAD~1 - Undo the last commit, and keep changes in the working directory.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git reset --hard HEAD~1 - Undo the last commit and discard all changes.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: git revert <commit-hash> - Create a new commit, undoes changes introduced by earlier commit.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
